settings.html:
<style>
/* ===== ZACHUCHIT PLUS — WOOCOMMERCE DARK THEME ===== */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Heebo:wght@300;400;600;700&display=swap');
body{background:#060606 !important;color:#F5F5F5 !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;}
a{color:#C9A84C;}
a:hover{color:#b8943f;}

/* ---- Product Grid ---- */
.woocommerce ul.products{display:grid !important;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:24px;direction:rtl;list-style:none;padding:0;margin:0;}
.woocommerce ul.products::before,.woocommerce ul.products::after{display:none !important;}
.woocommerce ul.products li.product{background:#111 !important;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.18) !important;border-radius:4px !important;overflow:hidden;transition:transform .35s ease;margin:0 !important;float:none !important;width:100% !important;padding:0 !important;}
.woocommerce ul.products li.product:hover{transform:translateY(-7px);}
.woocommerce ul.products li.product a img{width:100% !important;height:240px;object-fit:cover;display:block;}
.woocommerce ul.products li.product .woocommerce-loop-product__title,.woocommerce ul.products li.product h2{color:#F5F5F5 !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;font-size:1em !important;font-weight:700 !important;direction:rtl;text-align:right;padding:16px 16px 4px !important;}
.woocommerce ul.products li.product .price{color:#C9A84C !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;font-size:1em !important;padding:0 16px 12px !important;display:block;}
.woocommerce ul.products li.product .button{background:#C9A84C !important;color:#060606 !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;font-weight:600 !important;border-radius:0 !important;width:100%;text-align:center;display:block;padding:12px 0 !important;margin:0 !important;}
.woocommerce ul.products li.product .button:hover{background:#b8943f !important;}
.added_to_cart{display:none !important;}

/* ---- Category tiles ---- */
.woocommerce ul.products li.product-category a h2,.woocommerce ul.products li.product-category .woocommerce-loop-category__title{color:#F5F5F5 !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;}
.woocommerce ul.products li.product-category mark{background:transparent !important;color:#C9A84C !important;}

/* ---- Breadcrumb ---- */
.woocommerce-breadcrumb{direction:rtl;color:rgba(245,245,245,.4) !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif;padding:12px 0;}
.woocommerce-breadcrumb a{color:#C9A84C !important;}

/* ---- Notices ---- */
.woocommerce-message{background:rgba(201,168,76,.1) !important;border-top:3px solid #C9A84C !important;color:#F5F5F5 !important;}
.woocommerce-error{background:rgba(200,60,60,.1) !important;border-top:3px solid #e05c5c !important;color:#F5F5F5 !important;}
.woocommerce-info{background:rgba(60,120,200,.1) !important;border-top:3px solid #4a90d9 !important;color:#F5F5F5 !important;}

/* ---- Single Product ---- */
.woocommerce div.product .product_title{color:#F5F5F5 !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;direction:rtl;font-weight:700;}
.woocommerce div.product p.price,.woocommerce div.product span.price{color:#C9A84C !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;font-size:1.6em !important;}
.woocommerce div.product .woocommerce-product-details__short-description{color:rgba(245,245,245,.65) !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;direction:rtl;line-height:1.8;}
.woocommerce div.product .woocommerce-tabs ul.tabs{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2) !important;direction:rtl;}
.woocommerce div.product .woocommerce-tabs ul.tabs li{background:#111 !important;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15) !important;border-bottom:none !important;}
.woocommerce div.product .woocommerce-tabs ul.tabs li a{color:rgba(245,245,245,.6) !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;}
.woocommerce div.product .woocommerce-tabs ul.tabs li.active a{color:#C9A84C !important;}
.woocommerce div.product .woocommerce-tabs .panel{background:#111 !important;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15) !important;color:rgba(245,245,245,.65) !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;direction:rtl;padding:24px !important;}
.woocommerce div.product form.cart .qty{background:#1a1a1a !important;color:#F5F5F5 !important;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.25) !important;border-radius:4px !important;}
.woocommerce-variation-price .price{color:#C9A84C !important;}

/* ---- All Buttons ---- */
.woocommerce #respond input#submit,.woocommerce a.button,.woocommerce button.button,.woocommerce input.button{background:#C9A84C !important;color:#060606 !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;font-weight:600 !important;border-radius:4px !important;border:none !important;}
.woocommerce #respond input#submit:hover,.woocommerce a.button:hover,.woocommerce button.button:hover,.woocommerce input.button:hover{background:#b8943f !important;color:#060606 !important;}
.woocommerce a.button.alt,.woocommerce button.button.alt,.woocommerce input.button.alt{background:#C9A84C !important;}

/* ---- Cart ---- */
.woocommerce table.shop_table{background:#111 !important;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15) !important;color:#F5F5F5 !important;direction:rtl;border-collapse:collapse;}
.woocommerce table.shop_table th{color:#C9A84C !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2) !important;padding:14px !important;text-align:right;}
.woocommerce table.shop_table td{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06) !important;color:#F5F5F5 !important;padding:14px !important;}
.woocommerce .cart-collaterals .cart_totals{background:#111 !important;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15) !important;color:#F5F5F5 !important;}
.woocommerce .cart-collaterals .cart_totals h2{color:#F5F5F5 !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;}
.woocommerce .cart-collaterals .cart_totals .order-total .amount{color:#C9A84C !important;font-weight:700;}
.woocommerce-cart-form .quantity input.qty{background:#1a1a1a !important;color:#F5F5F5 !important;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.25) !important;border-radius:4px !important;}

/* ---- Checkout ---- */
.woocommerce-checkout h3{color:#F5F5F5 !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;direction:rtl;}
.woocommerce form .form-row input.input-text,.woocommerce form .form-row textarea,.woocommerce form .form-row select{background:#1a1a1a !important;color:#F5F5F5 !important;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.25) !important;border-radius:4px !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;}
.woocommerce form .form-row label{color:rgba(245,245,245,.7) !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;direction:rtl;display:block;text-align:right;}
.woocommerce #payment{background:#111 !important;border-radius:4px !important;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15) !important;}
.woocommerce #payment ul.payment_methods{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.15) !important;}
.woocommerce #payment ul.payment_methods li label{color:#F5F5F5 !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;}
.woocommerce #payment div.payment_box{background:#1a1a1a !important;color:rgba(245,245,245,.65) !important;}
#order_review_heading{color:#F5F5F5 !important;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif !important;}

/* ---- My Account ---- */
.woocommerce-account .woocommerce-MyAccount-navigation ul{list-style:none;padding:0;}
.woocommerce-account .woocommerce-MyAccount-navigation ul li a{color:#C9A84C;font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif;direction:rtl;display:block;padding:10px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.12);}
.woocommerce-account .woocommerce-MyAccount-content{color:rgba(245,245,245,.7);font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif;direction:rtl;}

/* ---- RTL fixes ---- */
.woocommerce .woocommerce-ordering{direction:rtl;}
.woocommerce-result-count{direction:rtl;color:rgba(245,245,245,.45);font-family:'Heebo',sans-serif;}
.woocommerce nav.woocommerce-pagination ul li a,.woocommerce nav.woocommerce-pagination ul li span{background:#111 !important;color:#F5F5F5 !important;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2) !important;}
.woocommerce nav.woocommerce-pagination ul li span.current{background:#C9A84C !important;color:#060606 !important;}

/* ---- Responsive ---- */
@media(max-width:900px){.woocommerce ul.products{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr) !important;}}
@media(max-width:480px){.woocommerce ul.products{grid-template-columns:1fr !important;}}
</style>

settings.editor: פריטי זכוכית בהתאמה אישית לבית, לאירועים ולמתנה — כל פריט נוצר בעבודת יד
כל פריט מעוצב בהתאמה אישית, מזוגג בעבודת יד

אנחנו מתמחים ביצירת פריטי זכוכית מעוצבים בעבודת יד. כל פריט נוצר עם תשומת לב לפרטים הקטנים — מהרעיון הראשוני ועד המוצר המוגמר שמגיע אליכם.

כל לוח זכוכית יכול לשאת ברכה, פסוק, שם משפחה או תמונת זוג — בסגנון שבחרתם.

settings.editor: ספרו לנו מה אתם צריכים ונחזור אליכם תוך 24 שעות עם הצעת מחיר
